name: fill_and_comm
script:
lemma "A \<and> B \<longrightarrow> B \<and> A"
proof
  assume h: "A \<and> B"
  show "B \<and> A"
    sorry
qed

name: fill_imp_trans
script:
lemma "(A \<longrightarrow> B) \<longrightarrow> (B \<longrightarrow> C) \<longrightarrow> A \<longrightarrow> C"
proof
  assume ab: "A \<longrightarrow> B"
  show "(B \<longrightarrow> C) \<longrightarrow> A \<longrightarrow> C"
  proof
    assume bc: "B \<longrightarrow> C"
    show "A \<longrightarrow> C"
    proof
      assume a: A
      show C
        sorry
    qed
  qed
qed

name: fill_de_morgan
script:
lemma "\<not> A \<and> \<not> B \<longrightarrow> \<not> (A \<or> B)"
proof
  assume h: "\<not> A \<and> \<not> B"
  show "\<not> (A \<or> B)"
    sorry
qed

name: fill_map_append
script:
lemma "map f (xs @ ys) = map f xs @ map f ys"
  sorry
